mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua在Modal焦点陷阱测试的关键步骤被硬超时终止(15min)。已确认Modal内3个可聚焦元素(×close/Close按钮/Save Changes按钮)的Tab顺序正常，但在即将验证Tab是否循环回第一个元素时被中断，无法判断焦点陷阱是否正常工作。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tab 3 result: Console shows Focus: BUTTON btn btn-primary Save Changes. Focus is now on the Save Changes button - the LAST focusable element in the modal. The focus sequence so far: 1. Modal DIV → when modal opened 2. × btn-close → Tab 1 3. btn-secondary Close → Tab 2 4. btn-primary Save Changes → Tab 3. Now the CRITICAL TEST: What happens when I press Tab ONE MORE TIME? If the focus trap is working, it should cycle back to the FIRST focusable element.
